note: Incremental update for Opus 4.8 release. Model ID format confirmed dateless (4.6+ convention).

api_changes.mid_conversation_system_messages: Messages API now accepts system entries inside the messages array. Developers can update instructions mid-task without breaking prompt cache.
api_changes.manual_thinking_removed: thinking: {type: 'enabled', budget_tokens: N} returns 400 on Opus 4.8. Must use thinking: {type: 'adaptive'}.
api_changes.batch_300k_output: Opus 4.8 supports up to 300k output tokens on Message Batches API with output-300k-2026-03-24 beta header.
